name: lore
description: Persistent, compounding long-term memory for Codex, powered by the Lore API.

interface.longDescription: Project-scoped Lore memory for Codex, with setup and wiki navigation skills plus optional lifecycle hooks for preload and turn ingest.
defaultPrompt: Use Lore to remember durable facts from this project.
Use Lore to answer questions from my long-term project memory.
